# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Canonical AI assistant instructions for this repository live in
[`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) at the repo root.

Before making changes, open `AGENTS.md` and follow it for:
- Backend selection (ONNX Runtime vs TensorRT)
- Build, format (clang-format/clang-tidy/cppcheck), and test commands
- Sanitizer and pre-commit setup
- `inference_app` usage (detection / segmentation / video / TensorRT engine)
